body:

This release serves as a permanent, continuously updated vault. Whenever a new stable patch is released by developers (ReVanced, MorpheApp, Anddea, etc.), automated builder compiles the latest APKs and Magisk/KernelSU modules and safely archives them here alongside the usual numbered releases.
